metadata.description: ShipASO — AI-native ASO for App Store and Google Play. Audit, research on real rank data, optimize to exact char limits, push, and prove the rank moved.

plugins.name: store-ops
plugins.description: The audit -> research -> ship -> verify ASO loop for App Store AND Google Play. Real rank data, no paid API. Free + MIT; the hosted agent (app.shipaso.com) runs it weekly for you.
